title: Urophyllum corniculatum

The classification of Urophyllum corniculatum reflects its evolutionary relationships with other plants within the Rubiaceae family and its shared characteristics with other species in the genus.

intro: Urophyllum corniculatum, also known as the 'horned Urophyllum', is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, with reported health benefits including the treatment of fever, inflammation, and respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs. The bioactive constituents of Urophyllum corniculatum include flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic compounds, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
